title: Vadukeeswarar temple
tagline: Vadukeeswarar temple — spiritual town of Puducherry

overview.short: Vadukeeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvandarkoil Temple, Thiruvandarkoil and Panchanadeeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvandarkoil ,
overview.description: Vadukeeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvandarkoil Temple, Thiruvandarkoil and Panchanadeeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvandarkoil , a village in Pondicherry - Villupuram highway in Pondicherry in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshiped as Vadukeeswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Thiripura Sundari. The temple is located on the Chennai - Villupuram highway.

topPlaces.name: Varadharajaperumal temple, Thirubuvanai
topPlaces.description: Varadaraja Perumal temple (also called Thirubuvanai Temple and Thodatri Perumal temple) in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. It is located in Thirubuvanai, a village, located 23 km (14 mi), in the outskirts of Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Thirubuvanai
topPlaces.description: Thirubuvanai () is a village in the union territory of Puducherry, India. It is located in Mannadipet commune panchayat of the Villianur taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kandamangalam block
topPlaces.description: The Kandamangalam block is a revenue block in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 45 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Kandamangalam
topPlaces.description: Kandamangalam (Tamil:கண்டமங்கலம்) is a town in Villupuram district, Villupuram taluk of Tamil Nadu. The town is one of the 13 panchayat unions in Villupuram district.

topPlaces.name: Kizhoor, Puducherry
topPlaces.description: Kizhoor is a village situated in the Villianur Commune Panchayat, Puducherry. It is located around 22 kilometers away from Pondicherry.

topPlaces.name: Sooramangalam
topPlaces.description: Sooramangalam is a panchayat village in Nettapakkam Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India.

topPlaces.name: Earipakkam
topPlaces.description: Earipakkam is a panchayat village in Nettapakkam Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India. It is also a revenue village under Nettapakkam firka.

topPlaces.name: Kalmandapam
topPlaces.description: Kalmandapam is a panchayat village in Nettapakkam Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vadukeeswarar temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vadukeeswarar temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vadukeeswarar temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (132 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (146 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vadukeeswarar temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vadukeeswarar temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vadukeeswarar temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vadukeeswarar temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vadukeeswarar temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Varadharajaperumal temple, Thirubuvanai, Thirubuvanai, Kandamangalam block, Kandamangalam, Kizhoor, Puducherry.
